summary: Iteration 76 - Comprehensive testing of Member Info Modal + Enrollment Q&A + Community Modal Photo features. All tests passed: (1) CMS Members info icon with data-testid='view-info-<member_id>' exists on all 15 member rows. (2) Member info modal opens with profile facts grid showing 14 fields (Phone, Gender, DOB, Country, State, City, ZIP, Address, Member Type, Level, Mentor, Sponsor, Status, Registered). (3) Enrollment Q&A section shows step-tagged answers with legal_checkbox rendering as 'Accepted'. (4) No-enrollment fallback correctly shows message for seeded members. (5) Historical enrollment (member_d35c97d94465) returns 44 answers with step tags. (6) Endpoint security verified - 401/403 without admin token. (7) My Community modal shows avatar with data-testid='community-modal-avatar' and conditionally renders photo img with data-testid='community-modal-photo' when avatar is set. (8) All 15 regression tests from iteration 75 pass.
critical_code_review_comments: MembersManager.js Info icon correctly placed BEFORE edit/delete icons with data-testid='view-info-{member_id}'
Member info dialog has data-testid='member-info-dialog' with profile grid data-testid='member-info-profile'
Enrollment Q&A section uses data-testid='member-info-enrollment' with per-row testid 'enrollment-row-{field_key}'
No-enrollment fallback uses data-testid='member-info-no-enrollment' with correct message
enrollment.py admin_member_enrollment correctly joins form_data with enrollment_fields, skips richtext, special-cases legal_checkbox
MyCommunity.js modal avatar has data-testid='community-modal-avatar' and conditionally renders img with data-testid='community-modal-photo'
seed_data_creation: 15 members total (admin + AUX-1/2/3 + 11 sample members AUX-101 to AUX-111). 13 historical enrollment applications exist but linked members were deleted.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 76 verified all new features: (1) Info icon on CMS Members table opens modal with profile facts + enrollment Q&A. (2) Seeded members (AUX-101 to AUX-111) return has_application=false. (3) Historical member_d35c97d94465 returns has_application=true with 44 answers. (4) My Community modal shows avatar with conditional photo rendering. All iteration 75 regression tests pass.
